subject: Palossand, a ghost-type Pokémon that resembles an animated sandcastle with eyes and sand-formed appendages
description: Palossand occupies the center of the card art, its sandcastle-shaped body rendered in beige and tan. Multiple tower-like turrets rise from the top, each bearing a reddish-orange eye. Two sand-colored arm-like appendages extend from the sides. The body has a wide, open maw at the base. The setting appears to be an open beachy or desert environment with blue sky visible above and sandy ground below. The figure floats slightly above the ground, consistent with its ghost typing.
foreground: Palossand's sandy body with extended arm-appendages above sandy ground
